name: mermaid-pdf
description: Export Mermaid diagram files (.mermaid) to PDF on save or via command.

mermaid-pdf.convertOnSave.description: Automatically export to PDF when a .mermaid file is saved.

mermaid-pdf.convertOnSaveExclude.description: List of filename patterns to exclude from convertOnSave.

mermaid-pdf.outputDirectory.description: Output directory for generated PDFs. Empty = 'Mermaid-to-PDF' subfolder next to source file. Absolute paths used as-is. Relative paths resolved from workspace root.

mermaid-pdf.mmdcPath.description: Full path to the mmdc executable. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH or npm global bin.

mermaid-pdf.StatusbarMessageTimeout.description: Duration (ms) to show the output filename in the status bar after a successful export.
